claim_boundary: Frozen release evidence covers TM01-TM23, including the release-only TM19 clean-install suite. It proves the declared synthetic, package, installation, skill-runtime, privacy, and UI test inventory only; it does not claim complete private semantic coverage.

partition_items.description: filesystem/Gmail provider-neutral metadata inventory, paging, retry, change sets, terminal dispositions, and no-delta freshness
external private roots and public inventory
clean clone/package, immutable Skill Pack, active view, optional managed projection, ResearchGuard gate, Git, and local release proof
WorkPackageV2 input accounting, typed bilingual findings, durable idempotent automatic original-owner dispatch, retry and restart
ObjectCoverageLedger, autonomous worker, blocked-object isolation, no-delta rescan, and restart recovery
safe visual derivatives, exact visual anchors, Matter relations, deterministic recommendation/selection, placeholders and correction
Databank-authority object browser, Standard/Compact, search/filter, detail/timeline, bilingual state, focus, responsive and desktop runtime

scoped_inventory_item_reasons.TI-TM19_clean_install_release: TM19 is owned by the frozen G12 release gate

target_split_derivation.rationale: The model hierarchy determines exact state, side-effect, transition-cell, and cross-cutting suite ownership.
